userReviews.title: Excellent performance and durability

educationalInfo.WhatIsARim: The rim is the cylindrical outer edge of a wheel that supports and seals the tire to the wheel, ensuring air retention in tubeless tires.
educationalInfo.MagWheels: Magnesium alloy wheels (mags) are lighter, have high strength-to-weight ratio, and superior vibration absorption. Commonly used in professional racing cars but more costly than aluminum or steel wheels.

products.name: Steel Rims
products.shipping: Shipping fee and delivery date to be negotiated. Chat with supplier for more details.
products.description: Wheelsky black E-coated steel rims for passenger cars, trailers, and light trucks. Durable corrosion-resistant finish with multiple PCD and offset options. Full Branding/packaging customization available.

products.name: Mountain E-Bike
customizationOptions: Parts customization (motor, tires, frame colors, etc.)
products.shipping: Shipping fee and delivery date to be negotiated. Chat with supplier for more details.
products.description: This electric mountain bike is a game-changer! Powered by a 48V 500W rear hub motor and a 48V 12.75AH lithium battery, it delivers strong performance and a max speed of 45km/h. products.description: The MOTOVELO City Eco KG9 is a lightweight and efficient 24-inch commuter e-bike designed for urban workers. Powered by a 48V 500W brushless motor and a removable 7.6Ah lithium battery, it offers a range of 30–60 km depending on throttle or PAS mode. With Shimano 7-speed gears, mechanical disc brakes, and front suspension, it ensures smooth rides through city streets. The colorful LCD display, LED headlight, and Bluetooth integration add convenience and safety. Perfect for eco-friendly daily commutes.
